diff -up '/usr/ports/german/BBBike/Makefile' '/tmp/BBBike/Makefile'
Index: ./Makefile
--- ./Makefile	Sat May 19 22:08:25 2007
+++ ./Makefile	Thu Jan 24 21:01:09 2008
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	BBBike
-PORTVERSION=	3.15
+PORTVERSION=	3.16
 PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	german
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
